mnemonics: FISH SANDWICH: Features, Image Segmentation, Histograms, Stereo vision, Active contours, Normalized cuts, Depth from focus/shape from shading, Watershed, Image stitching, Clustering, Hough transform
keyPoints: Image Segmentation partitions an image into meaningful regions.
Feature Extraction identifies key points and descriptors for image matching.
Stereo Vision computes depth from multiple images.
commonMistakes: Confusing edge detection with image segmentation.
Using inappropriate feature descriptors for a given image type.
Misapplying the Hough transform for complex shapes.
